title: CampaignCharter v1
description: A0.1 campaign charter: defines direction, constraints, and governance for a campaign.

domain.description: Primary target domain for evaluation/constraints (HEP-first recommended: hep-ph | hep-th | nucl-th). Not a hard lock: cross-domain method/analogy operators may consult other domains as configured (typically via extensions), but must still satisfy target-domain constraints and grounding.

approval_gate_ref.description: Reference to the orchestrator gate config or an artifact URI for A0.1.

distributor.description: Distributor/BanditPolicy campaign-level configuration (auditable; must remain stable within a campaign).

extensions.description: DomainPack-specific knobs (kept out of the stable surface). Recommended keys: folklore_risk_threshold (number in [0,1], default 0.7; if folklore_risk_score >= threshold then require A0-folklore human gate).
